Communicating performance trade-offs and strategic recommendations to non-technical marketing leadership requires human communication skills.

domain_skills.skill_name: Script Writing for Video and Audio Ads

Copywriter.ai_exposure_detail: ChatGPT, Jasper AI, and Copy.ai generate first-draft ad copy, email subject lines, product descriptions, and landing page content at scale, fundamentally changing copywriting workflows. Copywriter.human_value_tasks: Copywriters develop original creative concepts, unexpected angles, and emotionally resonant narratives that differentiate brands — authentic human creativity that AI-generated copy consistently lacks in originality and cultural nuance. They understand Indian linguistic sensibilities, regional idioms, and code-switching patterns that make copy genuinely resonate with diverse Indian audiences. Award-winning creative work requires human creative courage, risk-taking, and aesthetic judgement.

Indian product companies expect DevOps engineers to implement cost-optimised cloud architectures given the sensitivity to AWS/Azure bills in growth-stage startups.

Blockchain Developer.human_value_tasks: Blockchain developers conduct smart contract security audits to identify reentrancy, overflow, and access control vulnerabilities — high-stakes work where AI-generated code frequently introduces exploitable bugs. They design token economics and governance models that balance incentives across diverse stakeholder groups, requiring economic reasoning and game theory knowledge. Navigating India's evolving VDA (Virtual Digital Asset) regulatory framework requires up-to-date legal and compliance awareness.
Blockchain Developer.narrative_para1: A junior Blockchain Developer at an Indian Web3 startup or enterprise blockchain project spends their week writing and testing Solidity smart contracts for Ethereum or Polygon, deploying contracts to testnets using Hardhat or Foundry, and integrating smart contracts with frontend applications via ethers.js or web3.js. Daily tasks include writing unit tests for contract functions, debugging failed transactions using block explorers like Polygonscan, reviewing gas consumption for contract optimisation, and integrating with wallets such as MetaMask. In enterprise contexts, they may work on Hyperledger Fabric or Quorum networks for permissioned blockchain use cases in supply chain or trade finance. Given India's evolving VDA regulatory landscape post the 2022 crypto tax rules, developers also track SEBI and RBI circulars for compliance implications.

Midjourney and generative AI tools are used for rapid concept art, texture generation, and asset ideation in indie and mid-size studios.
Game Developer.human_value_tasks: Game developers design the core gameplay loop, pacing, and feel — elements requiring creative vision and iterative player testing that AI cannot replicate. They optimise rendering and CPU performance for target hardware, applying platform-specific profiling knowledge that demands deep technical expertise. Collaboration with artists, sound designers, and game designers to achieve a cohesive player experience requires human creative direction.
Game Developer.narrative_para1: A junior Game Developer at an Indian mobile or PC game studio spends their week writing gameplay scripts in C# (Unity) or C++ (Unreal Engine), implementing game mechanics from designer specifications, and fixing bugs found during internal playtesting. Daily tasks include building game systems such as inventory, save state, and enemy AI, integrating mobile SDKs for analytics (Firebase) and in-app purchases (Google Play Billing), and profiling game performance on target Android and iOS devices. Indian mobile game studios primarily target the hyper-casual and mid-core mobile segments — requiring developers to optimise aggressively for lower-spec Android devices common in India's mass market, and to integrate monetisation systems including rewarded ads and battle passes.

Embedded Systems Engineer.ai_exposure_detail: GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT assist in generating peripheral driver templates, HAL abstraction layer code, and unit test stubs for embedded C/C++ codebases. ChatGPT supports debugging register-level issues and interpreting microcontroller datasheets. AI tools are beginning to assist with hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) test script generation.
Embedded Systems Engineer.human_value_tasks: Embedded systems engineers debug hardware-software interaction issues using oscilloscopes, logic analysers, and JTAG debuggers — skills requiring physical hardware access and deep electronics knowledge AI cannot replicate. They optimise firmware for power consumption, memory footprint, and real-time determinism, requiring trade-off decisions specific to each hardware platform. Hardware bring-up, involving first-boot debugging on new PCB revisions, requires hands-on investigation skills.
Embedded Systems Engineer.narrative_para1: A junior Embedded Systems Engineer at an Indian hardware startup, automotive electronics firm, or industrial IoT company spends their week writing firmware in C and C++ for microcontrollers such as STM32 or ESP32, debugging hardware-software integration issues using oscilloscopes and JTAG debuggers, and reviewing hardware schematics to understand peripheral interfacing requirements. Daily tasks include implementing communication protocols such as UART, SPI, I2C, and CAN, writing interrupt service routines, optimising firmware for real-time performance on RTOS platforms like FreeRTOS, and collaborating with hardware engineers on board bring-up for new PCB revisions. Indian automotive electronics suppliers and industrial automation companies are active employers in this space, particularly in Pune, Bengaluru, and Chennai.

Starting at Rs.3.5-6 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.7-12 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.12-20 lakh at senior engineer level, and Rs.20-40 lakh for principal firmware engineers. ARM Cortex-M certifications and AUTOSAR familiarity are valuable for automotive segment careers. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

IoT Developer.ai_exposure_detail: GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT generate firmware code, cloud integration scripts, and AWS IoT Core rule configurations. Amazon Q Developer assists with AWS IoT device management and Greengrass component development. AI tools help interpret sensor datasheet protocols and generate device shadow handling code.
IoT Developer.human_value_tasks: IoT developers physically commission and debug device fleets in field environments — warehouses, factories, agricultural fields — where remote debugging is insufficient and hands-on troubleshooting is essential. They design power-efficient firmware for battery-operated devices that must operate for years without maintenance, requiring hardware-specific optimisation beyond AI's code generation capability. Security architecture decisions for devices that cannot be easily patched post-deployment require careful upfront human design.
IoT Developer.narrative_para1: A junior IoT Developer at an Indian smart device startup, industrial automation company, or agritech firm spends their week writing firmware for ESP32 or Raspberry Pi-based devices, integrating sensors (temperature, humidity, GPS, accelerometer) with cloud platforms like AWS IoT Core or Azure IoT Hub, and building backend services to process device telemetry data. Daily tasks include configuring MQTT message brokers, writing Python scripts for edge data preprocessing using AWS Greengrass, debugging device connectivity issues in field environments, and maintaining device management dashboards. They coordinate with hardware engineers on PCB design reviews and work with mobile developers on companion app integrations. Indian smart agriculture, smart manufacturing, and smart city projects create active demand for IoT developers comfortable across both firmware and cloud layers.

IoT Developer.narrative_para3: B.Tech in CS, ECE, or EEE graduates with interest in both hardware and cloud development are well positioned. Those who enjoy solving problems across the full IoT stack — from sensor interfacing to cloud dashboards — and are comfortable with field deployment challenges will thrive. Starting at Rs.3.5-6 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.7-12 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.12-20 lakh at senior developer level, and Rs.20-40 lakh for IoT architects. IT Support Engineer.ai_exposure_detail: ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot assist IT support engineers in generating step-by-step troubleshooting guides, drafting knowledge base articles, and researching solutions for uncommon error codes. AI-powered service desk tools increasingly auto-suggest resolutions from historical tickets, reducing resolution time. Notion AI helps maintain and update internal runbooks and SOPs.
IT Support Engineer.human_value_tasks: IT support engineers provide empathetic, context-sensitive assistance to non-technical users who need patient, clear guidance — human communication skills AI chatbots cannot fully replicate. They diagnose complex environmental issues (hardware failures, software conflicts, network intermittency) that require physical investigation and lateral thinking. Escalation decisions, vendor management during hardware failures, and executive-level support require human judgement and accountability.
IT Support Engineer.narrative_para1: A junior IT Support Engineer at an Indian enterprise, BPO, or IT services company spends their week resolving end-user tickets in ServiceNow covering issues such as laptop hardware failures, VPN connectivity problems, software installation requests, and Microsoft 365 access issues. Daily tasks include provisioning and deprovisioning user accounts in Azure Active Directory (Entra ID), configuring endpoints with Microsoft Intune, supporting video conferencing setups, and maintaining hardware inventory records. They handle printer and network peripheral troubleshooting, escalate complex issues to L2 or L3 teams, and contribute to the internal knowledge base by documenting recurring issue resolutions. Indian BPO and IT services environments operate 24x7 support models requiring shift flexibility, while enterprise IT teams focus on business-hours support with on-call coverage.

Those who genuinely enjoy helping people with technology problems, can explain technical concepts clearly to non-technical users, and stay calm under complaint pressure will thrive.
